category_sources: Official repository description says it is a TCP proxy for chaos and resiliency testing.
source_facts.description says Toxiproxy simulates network and system conditions for chaos and resiliency testing.
display_name_sources: Official Shopify repository uses the project name Toxiproxy.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains API, CLI, toxics, and FAQ documentation.
Official repository links CREATING_TOXICS.md and METRICS.md for specific documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/Shopify/toxiproxy, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository README documents TCP proxy toxics and HTTP API behavior.
source_facts.description identifies TCP proxy, chaos, resiliency, and network/system condition simulation.
